author: demithras
title: Systematic violation of private module boundaries -- 87 imports across 55 files bypass engine encapsulation
notes: Duplicate of S034 (@xinlingfeiwu). Same core finding: app/ bypasses engine._* private modules. S235 expands scope to include intelligence/ (30 additional imports, 87 total vs S034's 57). Counts accurate (87 imports, 55 files). Two factual errors: claims state.py facade exists (only plan.py does), says 24 StateModel imports (actually 27). S034 submitted earlier with correct facade analysis.
